skills.name: consuelo-design
skills.title: Consuelo Design
skills.description: Top-level orchestration skill for Consuelo Design artifact work. Teaches agents how to chain existing workspace tools, design facade scripts, templates, browser validation, durable publishing, and design wiki verification.
skills.trigger: Invoke when the user asks for Consuelo Design artifact work, design wiki publishing, website/spec/demo generation, or design workflow orchestration.

skills.name: consuelo-design-landing-page
skills.title: Consuelo Design Landing Page (compatibility alias)
skills.description: Deprecated compatibility alias for the landing-page subskill under the top-level consuelo-design skill. Prefer consuelo-design with subskill=landing-page for new design work.
skills.trigger: Invoke only for legacy calls that still reference the old consuelo-design-landing-page skill name.

skills.name: consuelo-workspace-snapshot
skills.title: Consuelo Workspace Snapshot
skills.description: Reads a structured, read-only snapshot of Consuelo workspace objects, including Files and Attachments, through the configured Consuelo GraphQL/API facade.
skills.trigger: Invoke when the user asks an agent to inspect Consuelo workspace records, files, attachments, tasks, notes, dashboards, or GraphQL-backed workspace context.

skills.name: daily-revenue-brief
skills.title: Daily Revenue Brief
skills.description: Builds a daily workspace revenue brief from approved structured context and writes a local artifact.
skills.trigger: Invoke when the user asks for a daily revenue brief, revenue summary, or workspace revenue artifact.

skills.name: senior-engineer
skills.title: Senior Engineer
skills.description: Use this skill for any coding, debugging, refactoring, architecture, validation, or task in the repository. This skill is the default engineering mode. Invoke it whenever the assistant is expected to read code, change code, diagnose a bug, design an implementation plan, review a diff, run tests, validate behavior, or prepare a PR.
skills.trigger: Use this skill for any coding, debugging, refactoring, architecture, validation, or task in the repository. This skill is the default engineering mode. Invoke it whenever the assistant is expected to read code, change code, diagnose a bug, design an implementation plan, review a diff, run tests, validate behavior, or prepare a PR.

skills.name: task
skills.title: Task Workflow
skills.description: PASTE Use this skill for any opensaas task lifecycle work: starting a task, researching, editing, publishing, creating the stream review PR, handling task metadata conflicts, or cleaning up. It enforces stream.context → task.start → task.push → task.pr → task.finish, explicit branch usage, verified tool results, metadata-only conflict rules, and reporting the stream/<area> → main review PR instead of the intermediate task PR.
skills.trigger: Invoke when the user asks to start, run, validate, publish, promote, inspect, recover, or finish repo/task-scoped work in a stream.
